meta.description: Market-price defensive interpretation using stored daily close history, SPY benchmark returns, and VIX stress observations.

downMarketDefense1Y.label: 1Y Down Market Defense
downMarketDefense1Y.description: Cumulative stock daily log return minus SPY daily log return on negative SPY-return days over the last trading year. Positive values mean the stock fell less than the market on down-market days.

downMarketDefense3Y.label: 3Y Down Market Defense
downMarketDefense3Y.description: Cumulative stock daily log return minus SPY daily log return on negative SPY-return days over the last three trading years. Positive values indicate repeated down-market defense across a longer window.

volatilityStressDefense1Y.label: 1Y Volatility Stress Defense
volatilityStressDefense1Y.description: Cumulative stock daily log return minus SPY daily log return on days where VIX is at least 25 over the last trading year. Positive values mean the stock held up better during high-volatility regimes.

volatilityStressDefense3Y.label: 3Y Volatility Stress Defense
volatilityStressDefense3Y.description: Cumulative stock daily log return minus SPY daily log return on days where VIX is at least 25 over the last three trading years. Positive values indicate stress-regime defensive behavior across a longer window.

drawdownDefense1Y.label: 1Y Drawdown Defense
drawdownDefense1Y.description: Ticker one-year max drawdown minus SPY one-year max drawdown. Positive values mean the ticker's peak-to-trough loss was shallower than SPY's.

downsideCaptureDefense1Y.label: 1Y Downside Capture Defense
downsideCaptureDefense1Y.description: One minus stock downside capture on negative SPY-return days over the last trading year. Positive values mean the stock captured less than the market's downside.
